status_line: Monday 5:36 PM ET / 21:36 UTC — eighteenth hour. Two consecutive fully quiet sweeps now on the books. SARAH Run 128 at 20:07 UTC was the first zero-delta sweep since Run 124, and Run 129 at 21:06 UTC made it back-to-back — zero moves, zero renames, zero deletes, no new ambiguities, no closures, across Downloads, Documents, Desktop, and the entire output tree. Top-level production count corrected to 48 (Run 128 reported 52 in error — pure miscount, no actual file movement). Recursive output tree still at 1,064 for the fourth straight push. The 12-item open-slate is fully stable: 8 non-Downloads carry-forwards plus 4 Downloads items (#7, #9, #15, #18). The hf_*.mp4 pair (#7 + #18, ~5.2 MB total) has now been sitting unattributed for ~24.4 hours and ~6.5 hours respectively — clearest single bulk-decision lever still 'SARAH bulk adopt hf videos' or 'SARAH bulk ignore hf videos'. Creative wing dark cycle continues: no new MAESTRO/WRITER/GUARDIAN/NOLAN/ATLAS/PARK output since the 14:40 push (eight cycles dark). SARAH flagged that jarvis-state.json heartbeat has been silent for two runs and dispatch-inbox.jsonl for three — pipeline reading as fully idle from her vantage. Lands' End now T-3 days; PARK Gallery deck and T2 v8 still GUARDIAN-unvalidated. Repo is 5 commits behind origin locally; writable-clone workaround stays in play for this push.
